scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: cd backend && npx prisma generate && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.prepare:db: cd backend && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && npx prisma generate && npm run seed
